title: Circuit Breaker
subject: Science
description: Digital logic bomb-defusal trainer: gates, latches, truth tables, and an AI tutor.
longDescription: Circuit Breaker is a circuit-lab style trainer where each level is a timed "charge" to disarm by building or adjusting logic: AND, OR, NOT, and flip-flops.
Campaign stages teach fundamentals through SR latches and JK flip-flops; Endless mode can pull fresh objectives when the portal's AI API is available.
Players practice Boolean reasoning, truth tables, and debugging circuits with optional hints from the in-game ordnance officer.
